ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jvm_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JVM configuration */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application this configuration applies to */,
  "min_heap_size" INTEGER /* Minimum heap size in bytes */,
  "max_heap_size" INTEGER /* Maximum heap size in bytes */,
  "initial_heap_size" INTEGER /* Initial heap size in bytes */,
  "uses_compressed_oops" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if compressed Oops are used */,
  "gc_policy" TEXT /* Garbage collection policy used */,
  "thread_stack_size" INTEGER /* Size of the stack for each thread */,
  "young_gen_size" INTEGER /* Size of the young generation in the heap */,
  "old_gen_size" INTEGER /* Size of the old generation in the heap */,
  "survivor_ratio" INTEGER /* Ratio of the young generation to survivor spaces */,
  "max_metaspace_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size of the metaspace */,
  "initial_metaspace_size" INTEGER /* Initial size of the metaspace */,
  "compressed_class_space_size" INTEGER /* Size of the compressed class space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jvm_configurations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the application is running */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the application details were updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the application was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the JVM configuration */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "heap_usage" INTEGER /* Current heap usage in bytes */,
  "heap_capacity" INTEGER /* Total heap capacity in bytes */,
  "heap_utilization" REAL /* Heap utilization percentage */,
  "young_gen_usage" INTEGER /* Current usage of the young generation in bytes */,
  "old_gen_usage" INTEGER /* Current usage of the old generation in bytes */,
  "metaspace_usage" INTEGER /* Current usage of the metaspace in bytes */,
  "compressed_class_space_usage" INTEGER /* Current usage of the compressed class space in bytes */,
  "gc_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last garbage collection event in milliseconds */,
  "gc_count" INTEGER /* Number of garbage collection events since the last metric recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES jvm_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Heap utilization threshold that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_message" TEXT /* Message describing how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES memory_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "sent_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the notification */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was resolved */,
  "resolution_message" TEXT /* Message describing how the notification was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the recommendation applies to */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text describing the memory optimization recommendation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was generated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the recommendation */,
  "implemented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who implemented the recommendation */,
  "implemented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the JVM configuration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "average_heap_usage" INTEGER /* Average heap usage for the day in bytes */,
  "peak_heap_usage" INTEGER /* Peak heap usage for the day in bytes */,
  "average_young_gen_usage" INTEGER /* Average usage of the young generation for the day in bytes */,
  "average_old_gen_usage" INTEGER /* Average usage of the old generation for the day in bytes */,
  "average_metaspace_usage" INTEGER /* Average usage of the metaspace for the day in bytes */,
  "average_compressed_class_space_usage" INTEGER /* Average usage of the compressed class space for the day in bytes */,
  "average_gc_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of garbage collection events for the day in milliseconds */,
  "average_gc_count" INTEGER /* Average number of garbage collection events for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES jvm_configurations ("config_id")
)
